title: Our Father's House Soup Kitchen - Florida Based Christian Charity

images.alt: Our Father's House Soup Kitchen Logo
We provide meals to the homeless in our area five days a week. Meals include a hot lunch as well as sandwiches and snacks they can take with them.
On select days we provide clothing to those who need it. We provide donated shirts, pants, shorts, socks, underwear and shoes.
When possible, we provide essential hygiene items to those who need it. We provide tooth brushes, tooth paste, floss, feminine products, and more.
Our Father's House Soup Kitchen Logo

desc: Donate to help the poor through Our Fathers House Soup Kitchen in Pompano Beach, Florida. We are a soup kitchen based on Christian values.

We Will Be Closed December 23rd to January 2nd
In order to allow our work staff and “angel” volunteers time to spend with their families over this Holy Christmas season, we will be closed this year beginning December 23rd and opening back up on January 2nd.  We will also be using that time for some much-needed maintenance.
Welcome
Our Father's House Soup Kitchen Official Website
The Our Father’s House Soup Kitchen is dedicated to serving God’s precious poor and homeless by preparing and serving a full-course hot lunch, and providing a take-out bag with a sandwich and other goodies for later in the day. You can donate to our Christian charity online and your gift will be tax deductible.

Our Commitment
To The Poor & Homeless of South Florida
Hot Lunches & Food Pantry
We provide meals to the homeless in our area five days a week. Meals include a hot lunch as well as sandwiches and snacks they can take with them.
Clothing & Shoes
On select days we provide clothing to those who need it. We provide donated shirts, pants, shorts, socks, underwear and shoes.
Personal Hygiene Items
When possible, we provide essential hygiene items to those who need it. We provide tooth brushes, tooth paste, floss, feminine products, and more.

About Us
Helping The Homeless For Over 30 Years
We Are A Non-Profit Christian Charity
Our Father’s House Soup Kitchen, Inc, a charitable tax-exempt, 501(c) (3) organization located in Pompano Beach, FL is dedicated to feeding the homeless and needy without discrimination. The primary mission is to provide hot lunches Monday through Friday in a peaceful and sheltered  environment and to provide other emergency food pantry items and clothing assistance on an as-needed basis.  The overall goal is to provide nutrition and hope to give guests a hand up rather than a handout.
Our Work for the Poor and Needy
We also continue to do our best to meet their clothing needs as well.
Most especially, we strive to lessen their hardships by serving them with all the love God has put into our hearts. As Mother Theresa said, “It’s not how much we do, but how much love we put into the doing.”
None of this can be accomplished, however, without cash donations and the need now is especially critical. Please consider donating to our cause.
Follow us on social media for important updates!
